# Europe, Ukraine, United Kingdom    Sastre and Millennium, the twin investigative firms snapping up business in Eastern Europe

Since the start of Russia's invasion of Ukraine, a web of consultants led by a Hungarian trio with handy connections in London has been picking up new Ukrainian contracts. \[...\]


Published on 28/07/2022 at 06:00 GMT
Reading time 2 minutes
